questions.text: Provide a brief description of your business or organisation, including any commercial relationships with Google and/or Wiz.

questions.section: Questions for customers of cloud security services and cloud providers
questions.text: Provide a brief description of the:  cloud security services you acquire or have acquired, including the functions of those services, your suppliers (including Google or Wiz, if applicable), and the cloud environments in which they are used (including multi-cloud, hybrid or on-premises environments).  cloud provider(s) you use, including whether you are a multi-cloud user and whether you use different providers for specific use cases.

questions.section: Questions for customers of cloud security services and cloud providers
questions.text: List any cloud security services you acquire or have acquired from Wiz for which you consider there are no effective substitutes for your requirements available from alternative suppliers (for example, in relation to functionality, performance or risk). Please explain why.

questions.section: Questions for customers of cloud security services and cloud providers
questions.text: In the event that Wiz’s security software was not available on, or its quality/integration was degraded when used with, non-Google cloud environments (but the software still worked the same when used with Google Cloud), would this affect your choice of cloud provider(s)? Explain why/why not, including any barriers to changing providers.

questions.section: Questions for customers of cloud security services and cloud providers
questions.text: In the event that non-Wiz security software was not available on, or its quality/integration was degraded when used with Google Cloud, would this affect your choice of cloud security service provider(s)? Explain why/why not, including any barriers to changing providers.

questions.section: Questions for suppliers of cloud security services
questions.text: To what extent do you compete with Wiz and/or Google in the supply of cloud security services, including the types of services, customer segments, or use cases?

questions.section: Questions for suppliers of cloud security services
questions.text: Provide detail as to what extent your cloud security services operate across different cloud and on-premises environments. For example: whether functionality, performance, or access differs materially by environment.

questions.section: Questions for suppliers of cloud security services
questions.text: Do you consider any changes to access, integration or interoperability in Google’s cloud environment could materially affect your ability to compete? Please explain why/why not.
Explain the extent to which the availability of Wiz’s cloud security services on your cloud environment is relevant to your ability to compete for customers. Other

What data, if any, would each of the merging parties obtain access to as a result of the Acquisition, that they would not otherwise have access to? For example:  data about customers’ use of alternative cloud platforms, which Google would not otherwise have had access to; and/or  data about customers’ use of alternative cloud security services, which Wiz would not otherwise have had access to. Provide an overview of the types of data, how the data access would arise in the ordinary course of providing the relevant services, and whether the data would be considered commercially sensitive and competitively valuable.

Provide any additional information or comments that you consider relevant to the ACCC’s assessment of the Acquisition, including any views on the effect of the Acquisition on competition in Australia.
